name: iac-audit-pack
title: Unbearable IaC Audit Pack
description: All four Unbearable TechTips audit Actors under one MCP endpoint: docker-compose (25 checks), Dockerfile (18 checks), GitHub Actions (13 checks), HU postcode validator (5 tools). Snyk-comparable IaC coverage at 10x cheaper. $19/mo unlimited individual audits. Built by Unbearable TechTips.

input.title: Actor input schema
